results.task: Read EVIDENCE.md only and, using the supplied GraphTrail context, determine the likely resolve_capabilities issue, affected behavior, and exact recommended code/test changes. Return concise evidence-backed findings.
results.text: {"answer_label":"incremental-463","answer":"Land #463: it builds on the resolver and presets already merged in #454, adding suggestion, receipt stats, and doctor warnings without duplicating resolution logic.","contradiction_caught":"#462 is presented as a roster change but re-implements functionality already merged in #454.","contradiction_explanation":"#462 started from an older base, conflicts with the merged resolver, adds a second roster_resolution.py module, and adds another minimal.toml preset.","minority_finding":"#462 could be salvaged only by rebasing and removing its duplicate resolver/preset work.","evidence":["#454 already merged packaged presets and fallback resolution in roster.py.","#463 extends that resolver and preserves existing presets; #462 conflicts and duplicates it."]}
